## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e`
- [ ] `pnpm validate:plugin`
- [ ] `pnpm validate:marketplace`

## Audit Invariants

- [ ] Duplicate evidence remains complete.
- [ ] Provider output without evidence remains invalid.
- [ ] No secrets are logged or exported.
